problem.title: Implement Merge Sort
problem.description:
Problem: Implement Merge Sort - Implement the algorithm.

Input:
- First line: integer n
- Second line: n space-separated integers

Output:
- Print the sorted array or search result

Example:
Input:
5
64 34 25 12 22

Output:
12 22 25 34 64

solution.explanation: Recursively split the array, merge sorted halves using a temporary array.
